docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ***FILING INVALIDATED DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF FILING FEES, SEE ORDER OF 2/7/12.*** FILED BY PETITIONER FLORES, CARINA CORUMPIDO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER FLORES, CARINA CORUMPIDO

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER FLORES, CARINA CORUMPIDO HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE RECORDER) OF OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-25-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER CARINA FLORES' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER FLORES, CARINA CORUMPIDO
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME BY CARINA CORUMPIDO FLORES ON 12/14/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE. (514)
